title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Digital

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Digital
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
